hero.newSubtitle: Crafted templates that turn your wedding announcement into an unforgettable first impression. One elegant link, infinite memories.
hero.title: Create Your Perfect
hero.subtitle: Share your love story with a beautiful, personalized wedding website. Manage RSVPs, showcase photos, and create lasting memories with your guests.
features.title: All features for a perfect wedding
features.subtitle: From inviting guests to sharing memories — everything in one link.
features.customizationDesc: Personalize your site with our easy-to-use tools.
features.rsvpManagementDesc: Keep track of guest responses in real-time.
features.photoGalleriesDesc: Create beautiful galleries to share your memories.
features.multiLanguageDesc: Make your site accessible in multiple languages.
features.venueIntegrationDesc: Easily share venue details with your guests.
features.backgroundMusicDesc: Add a romantic touch with background music.

templates.subtitle: Choose from our collection of professionally designed templates.

templates.bohoChicDesc: For a free-spirited and artistic wedding.

pricing.subtitle: Transparent pricing for every couple.

collection.title: Templates as unique as your
comparison.title: Your wedding deserves
comparison.subtitle: Imagine your guests' faces when they receive something they have never seen before. Not just another invitation — the first magical moment of your wedding.
comparison.modern.item1: An experience your guests will always remember
comparison.modern.item2: Unique visuals of your story and venue
comparison.modern.item3: Music, animations, and moments that move
comparison.modern.item5: Instant delivery to everyone, no hidden costs
comparison.quote: The first impression of your wedding starts with the invitation. Make it unforgettable.
